Think About It
Hint Cards
Click each question card to reveal a helpful hint for your writing!
🗺️ Where are the tallest trees found?
The tallest trees in the United States are found in Redwood National Park in California, on the West Coast.
🌲 What are these trees called?
They are called Coastal Redwoods — the tallest trees in the entire world!
📖 What did you learn about them?
These ancient trees have survived since the age of dinosaurs by resisting fire, rot, and insects.
✏️ What words describe them?
Try: tall, ancient, massive, impressive, giant, amazing
